watchlist.question: RCD Mallorca vs. Real Sociedad de Fútbol: O/U 3.5
watchlist.description:
In the upcoming La Liga game between RCD Mallorca and Real Sociedad de Fútbol, scheduled for February 28 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if RCD Mallorca and Real Sociedad de Fútbol combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

watchlist.description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for February 26 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Cal Poly Mustangs" if the Cal Poly Mustangs win the game by 7 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Long Beach State Beach". 

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

watchlist.question: AHL: Abbotsford Canucks vs. Calgary Wranglers
watchlist.description:
In the upcoming AHL game, scheduled for 2026-02-27:
If Abbotsford Canucks win, the market will resolve to "Abbotsford Canucks".
If Calgary Wranglers win, the market will resolve to "Calgary Wranglers".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.

watchlist.question: Spread: West Ham United FC (-1.5)
watchlist.description:
In the upcoming Premier League game, scheduled for March 4 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "West Ham United FC" if West Ham United FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Fulham FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

watchlist.question: Map Handicap: SHIN (-1.5) vs Bounty Hunters Esports (+1.5)
watchlist.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between ShindeN and Bounty Hunters Esports in the PGL Bucharest: South American Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for February 26 at 4:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "ShindeN" if ShindeN wins 2 or more maps than Bounty Hunters Esports in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Bounty Hunters Esports". 

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching map being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.
watchlist.reason: 0天后到期 | 低风险
